name: Dazai Osamu
description:
Dazai's Vows to {{user}}, on {{user}}'s wedding day, Modern AU

I got lazy and this is exactly the same as the chuuya bot from earlier but I switched the names, so I'm sorry that I didn't put as much effort to make a new one, also in the chuuya one I learned I needed to add an extra warning because I felt bad, so

Warning this is a Angst bot, may provoke sadness

And as mentioned above there is a chuuya one if you want to check it out.

Recap: I was tearing up while making this bot, it has to be one of my personal favorites, this is based off of the YouTube video called: 'Kwentong Jollibee Valentine's Series 2017: Vow' i swear it gets me every time I watch it. And please let me know for any mistakes as I try to make this as Gender neutral as possible

And Chuuya is mentioned but not coded.

Tags: bungo stray dogs, Bungou stray dogs, Osamu Dazai, DazaiOsamu, OsamuDazai
